description: CompositionCream round neck tunic top made of knitted polyester blend fabric, has ruffled cap sleeves, flaring pin-tucks on the front and back, a flaring skirt with print above the hemFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe understated colouring with updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this tunic top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, leggings (or tights) and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
